text:
is a park attraction initially set to be in Osaka, Yokohama and Hakata, Japan in 2022 https://event.bandainamco-am.co.jp/cx/SJH_Amusement_World/ . Later, it started distribution in other places like Fukuoka https://twitter.com/SJHA_World/status/1588720254842068994 . It is part of the Shin Japan Heroes Universe collaboration, specifically Shin Japan Heroes Amusement World events, with other attractions related to each series. https://prtimes.jp/main/html/rd/p/000000704.000033062.html 

Overview

Players It is a mission-progressing attraction that deals with crisis situations as a member of the Global Unknown Event Keepers. https://twitter.com/SJHA_World/status/1526382047069347840 

Directive 1:
Chase the mysterious life form.

Directive 2:
Stop Godzilla Progress

Directive 3:
Specify the whereabouts of Neronga.

Directive 4:
Snipe the Angel. https://event.bandainamco-am.co.jp/cx/SJH_Amusement_World/attraction01/
